name: chatgpt-bridge
description: Use your own ChatGPT browser session from Codex to generate, export, measure, and review image assets.

interface.longDescription: Open ChatGPT in the Codex in-app browser, use the user's own signed-in subscription session, generate single images or coherent batches, export original assets, measure actual dimensions, and write review-ready manifests without collecting credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use ChatGPT to generate one image and save the original locally.
Generate a coherent set of 9 images in ChatGPT and export them.
Check whether I am signed in to ChatGPT before generating images.
